mechanics_page.title: Classical Mechanics
mechanics_page.description: 6 interactive experiments covering motion, forces, and energy. Perfect for understanding how objects move and interact in our world!

projectile.title: Projectile Motion
projectile.description: See how objects fly through the air when thrown at an angle! Perfect for understanding sports like basketball or cannonball trajectories.

pendulum.title: Pendulum
pendulum.description: Watch a swinging pendulum! This simple motion helps us understand timekeeping and energy transfer. Galileo discovered its secrets!

spring.title: Spring / Simple Harmonic Motion
spring.description: See how springs bounce back and forth! This is called Simple Harmonic Motion (SHM). Springs are in clocks, cars, and trampolines!

collision.title: Collisions
collision.description: Watch what happens when objects crash into each other! Learn about momentum and energy conservation - super important for car safety!

circular.title: Circular Motion
circular.description: See why things spin in circles! From planets orbiting the Sun to rides at the amusement park, circular motion is everywhere!

incline.title: Inclined Plane
incline.description: Watch objects slide down ramps! This helps us understand how friction and gravity work together on slopes.

electromagnetism_page.title: Electromagnetism
electromagnetism_page.description: Explore electricity and magnetism - the forces that power our entire modern world!

circuits.title: Electric Circuits
circuits.description: Build and test electric circuits! Learn how electricity flows through wires to power everything from your phone to your house.

fields.title: Electric Fields
fields.description: See the invisible forces between electric charges! This is why static electricity makes your hair stand up.

magnetic.title: Magnetic Fields
magnetic.description: Explore the power of magnets! Earth itself is a giant magnet - that's why compasses point north!

induction.title: Electromagnetic Induction
induction.description: Discover how moving magnets create electricity! This is how power plants generate the electricity in your home.

thermodynamics_page.title: Thermodynamics
thermodynamics_page.description: Learn about heat, temperature, and energy transfer - the science behind engines, refrigerators, and even the weather!

heat.title: Heat Transfer
heat.description: Watch how heat moves between objects! Heat can travel by conduction (touch), convection (flow), or radiation (waves).

gas.title: Gas Laws
gas.description: See how gases behave when heated or compressed! This explains why balloons expand in the sun and shrink in the cold.

engines.title: Heat Engines
engines.description: Learn how engines convert heat into motion! Car engines and steam trains both use this principle.

entropy.title: Entropy
entropy.description: Discover why things naturally get messier over time! Entropy explains why you can't unscramble an egg or why time flows forward.

waves_page.title: Waves & Sound
waves_page.description: Explore the wonderful world of waves - from sound and light to ocean waves and earthquakes!

sine.title: Sine Waves
sine.description: The basic building block of all waves! Every wave can be made by adding simple sine waves together - it's like musical notes!

sound.title: Sound Waves
sound.description: See how sound travels through air! Sound is vibrations - when you speak, your vocal cords make the air shake all the way to someone's ears!

light.title: Light
light.description: Light is an electromagnetic wave! It travels faster than anything in the universe - nothing can beat it!

interference.title: Wave Interference
interference.description: See what happens when waves meet! They can add up (constructive) or cancel out (destructive) - this is how noise-canceling headphones work!

modern_page.title: Modern Physics
modern_page.description: Discover the mind-bending physics of the 20th century - relativity, quantum mechanics, and the structure of atoms!

relativity.title: Relativity
relativity.description: Einstein showed that time and space aren't fixed! The faster you move, the slower time passes - this is real science, not science fiction!

quantum.title: Quantum Mechanics
quantum.description: The physics of the incredibly small! Atoms can be in two places at once and cats can be alive and dead - welcome to quantum weirdness!

atoms.title: Atomic Structure
atoms.description: Everything is made of atoms! Atoms have a tiny nucleus with protons and neutrons, surrounded by electrons - mostly empty space!

nuclear.title: Nuclear Physics
nuclear.description: Learn about the incredible power inside every atom! Nuclear reactions power the Sun and can generate enough energy for entire cities.

library_page.title: Physics Library
library_page.description: Your reference guide for all things physics!

challenges_page.title: Physics Challenges
challenges_page.description: Test your physics knowledge with fun challenges!
